ﾃ砧.
S Tezmamt ipbegginen!
Nessader ip id, ih, deg iv iﾃｴqan. Ih, Nekwni, Nella d ineddaﾃｴen!
Iban ed degs, yal lameﾃｴ uﾃｻwib.
Lameﾃｴ s$uﾃｴneﾂ｣. Ih, Nekwni Nella d wid Ippaznen.
Aﾃｪunu s$uﾃｴ Mass ik. Ih, Neppa Isell, d Amusnaw.
Mass n tmurt, igenwan akked wayen illan garasen, ma tepputebbtem.
Ur illi ﾃｴebbi siwa Neppa. Issidir, Ineqq. D Mass nnwen, u Mass n lejdud nnwen, imezwura.
Xaﾃｮi! Nitni, di ccekk, ppuraren.
Qaﾃｴaﾃ｢ ass, ideg ara d iawi igenni, abbu ipbegginen.
Ad i$umm imﾃｹdanen. Wagi d aﾃ｢aqeb aqeﾃｴﾃｪan.
"A Mass nne$! Kkes a$ aﾃ｢aqeb; nekwni d lmumnin"!
Amek ara sﾃ｢un asmekti, wanag iusa ten id Umazan ipbegginen?
D$a wexxﾃｴen as, u nnan: "d aselmad aﾃｴehbani". ﾂｲ
Ma Nessenqes awen cwiﾃｮ uﾃ｢aqeb, ihi, kunwi, a ppu$alem ar din.
Ass ideg ara Neﾃｩdem fellasen, ﾃｩﾃｩedma tabarart, war ccekk, a d Nerr ppaﾃｴ.
Ni$ Njeﾃｴﾃｴeb, uqbel nnsen, agdud n Ferﾃ｢un. Iusa ten id umazan ukyis.
"Seddut yidi imdanen n ﾃ貌bbi; nek, $uﾃｴwen, d amazan muman.
Ur ssem$waﾃｴet iman nnwen, zdat ﾃ貌bbi. Nek, usi$ d $uﾃｴwen, s udabu n ﾃｻﾃｻeﾃｪ.
Nek, ad iyi Isseﾃｴ Mass iw u d Mass nnwen, ur iyi tﾃｴeoomem.
Ma ur iyi tuminem ara, aﾃ｢zlet iyi".
Inuj $eﾃｴ Mass is ar wigi d agdud ibe$wviyen.
"Awi imdanen iW deg iv. War ccekk, a kwen in vefﾃｴen.
Eoo ill ildi; nitni, ih, d lﾃ｢askeﾃｴ ara i$emqen".
Ay ooan di tebﾃｪirin, akked tliwa,
igran, ixxamen ukyisen,
l$it swayes zehhun!
Akka ay ten Nefka d lweﾃｴt i ugdud nniven.
Ur d run, fellasen, igenni akked tmurt. Ur ggunin.
Ni$ Nsellek At Isﾃｴail, seg uﾃ｢aqeb isdullun,
si Ferﾃ｢un, i illan, s tidep, d amnefxi ger imaﾃ｢fan.
S tmusni ay ten Nefren deg imavalen.
Nefka yasen seg issekniyen, wid ujeﾃｴﾃｴeb ipbegginen.
Ih, widak la qqaﾃｴen:
"Siwa tameppant nne$ tamezwarut, ur fella$ tanekra.
Awit ed imezwura nne$, ma tessawalem tidep"!
Menyif nitni ne$ agdud n Tubbaﾃ｢, akked wid i ten id izwaren? Nessenger iten. S tidep, nitni llan d ibe$wviyen.
Ur Nexliq ara tamurt, igenwan, akked wayen illan garasen, i wurar.
Nxelq iten kan s tidep, maca, tegwti degsen, ur ssinen.
S tidep, ass n ufraz, ad mlilen meﾃｴﾃｴa.
Ass ideg aﾃｪbib ur i$ennu aﾃｪbib, s wacemma; nitni ur pwasellken.
Kkes ed wid i$ef Iﾃｪun ﾃ貌bbi. Neppa, s tidep, d Uzmir, Ipﾃｪunu.
Ih, ttejﾃｴa n Zaqqum,
uﾃｧﾃｧi umednub,
am nnﾃｪas ifsin, ippayzag di tﾃ｢abbuvin,
akken ppayzagen waman.
"Ddemt ep, zu$ﾃｴet ep, ar pnaﾃｻfa ujajiﾃｪ,
sinna, smiret sufella uqeﾃｴﾃｴu s, aﾃ｢aqeb ippayzagen".
"Jeﾃｴﾃｴeb! Ni$ keﾃｧﾃｧ d uzmir, d ukyis"!
Ih, wagi d ayen i la tepcukkum.
Wanag wid iﾃｪezzben, deg umekkan n laman;
di leonanat akked tliwa;
lebsa nnsen s leﾃｪrir, leﾃｪrir iﾃｪewwcen. Mqabalen.
Akka, a ten Njewweo akked tﾃｪuﾃｴtin lﾃ｢in.
A d ssutren, dinna, yal izwayen, di laman.
Ur pjeﾃｴﾃｴiben, dinna, tameppant, siwa tameppant tamezwarut. Isellek iten seg uﾃ｢aqeb ujajiﾃｪ.
D lfevl n Mass ik, d wagi ay d rrbeﾃｪ ameqwﾃｴaﾃｪan.
Nsehhel it kan, s tmeslayt ik, amendeﾃｴ ma a d mmektin.
Ggani, ula d nitni la pganin.
